## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (Fixes #…). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew test` and `./gradlew assembleDebug` pass locally
- [ ] Follows the design system (docs/DESIGN.md) for any UI change
- [ ] No code, strings, icons, or assets copied from Daylio or other closed apps (clean-room)
- [ ] No proprietary / tracker dependencies added
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under *Unreleased*
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO: `git commit -s`)
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes
